A

Algorithm - Interface in com.visualizer.Model
Base interface that define the functionnal behavior of a given algorithm, This is NOT defining the metadata of an algorithm, this is AlgorithmMetadata role
AlgorithmBrowser - Interface in com.visualizer.Model
Define the behaviour of the AlgorithmBrowser Controller,
AlgorithmBrowserFragment - Class in com.visualizer.View.Fragment
The View constructor for the Algorithm Browser, It contain a ListView listing every algorithm and a ChoiceBox to filter Algorithm by categories.
AlgorithmBrowserFragment(AlgorithmBrowserViewModel, Coordinator) - Constructor for class com.visualizer.View.Fragment.AlgorithmBrowserFragment
 
AlgorithmBrowserViewModel - Class in com.visualizer.ViewModel
This class is the controller of the AlgorithmBrowserFragment, it interact with the AlgorithmRegistry and filter when the Discovered algorithm
AlgorithmBrowserViewModel() - Constructor for class com.visualizer.ViewModel.AlgorithmBrowserViewModel
 
AlgorithmMetadata - Annotation Type in com.visualizer.Model
Algorithm Metadata Decorator, Way easier to deal with when it comes to reflection
AlgorithmRegistry - Class in com.visualizer.DomainObject.Algorithms
Reflection algorithm used to list every Algorithm created
AlgorithmRegistry() - Constructor for class com.visualizer.DomainObject.Algorithms.AlgorithmRegistry
 
AlgorithmRegistry.DescribedAlgorithm - Class in com.visualizer.DomainObject.Algorithms
A Described algorithm is an Algorithm with a runnable instance and Its metadata.
App - Class in com.visualizer
JavaFX App
App() - Constructor for class com.visualizer.App

The main view class It is a BorderPane to easily split the different parts of the software appart, Each parts are called Fragment
